title: Kimura® Pro Grass Shears - Premium Lawn Shears with 360° Rotating Head, Japanese SK5 Steel Blades, Lightweight, Ergonomic TPR Coated Handles, Ideal Garden Shears for Edging and Trimming - 370mm
features: [ SHARP & PRECISE ] - The premium Japanese SK5 steel blades ensure precision trimming and long-lasting edge retention. Ideal for both edging and trimming your lawn with minimal effort.

[ ERGONOMIC DESIGN ] - The non-slip handles feature a smooth layered grip for enhanced comfort, control and safety. The even distribution of weight between the blades and handles makes it easy for anyone to use these grass shears.
[ VERSATILE ] – The grass shears are equipped with a 360° rotating swivel head allowing for 16 cutting positions that enable you to effortlessly trim your lawn.
[ LOW FRICTION ] - PTFE coating help the grass shears glide through grass without sap build-up or rusting, allowing for a smooth cut every time.
[ SAFE & EASY TO USE ] - Kimura’s lawn trimmer has a hand guard ensuring a sturdy grip, improved handling and protection against edges, rocks and fences.
[ MADE TO LAST ] – Reinforced ABS construction with anti-rust components and riveted handles guarantee a durable product that is sure to stand the test of time.

[ LIFETIME WARRANTY ] - We are so confident in the quality of our grass shears that a lifetime warranty is included in your purchase. If for any reason you are unsatisfied with your purchase, simply contact us and we will make it right.
